keyEvents.text: Goal! Norway 1, England 0. Andreas Schjelderup (Norway) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the top right corner. Assisted by Martin Ødegaard.
Goal! Norway 1, England 1. Jude Bellingham (England) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, England. Bukayo Saka replaces Noni Madueke.
Substitution, England. Eberechi Eze replaces Declan Rice.
Substitution, Norway. Fredrik Aursnes replaces Julian Ryerson because of an injury.
Substitution, Norway. Oscar Bobb replaces Alexander Sørloth.
Substitution, Norway. Antonio Nusa replaces Andreas Schjelderup.
Substitution, England. Reece James replaces Anthony Gordon.
Substitution, England. Djed Spence replaces Nico O'Reilly.
Substitution, England. Morgan Rogers replaces Ezri Konsa.
Substitution, Norway. Marcus Pedersen replaces David Møller Wolfe.
Substitution, Norway. Leo Østigård replaces Torbjørn Heggem.
Goal! Norway 1, England 2. Jude Bellingham (England) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner following a corner.
Substitution, Norway. Jørgen Strand Larsen replaces Erling Haaland.
Substitution, England. Dan Burn replaces Jude Bellingham.
Kristoffer Ajer (Norway) is shown the yellow card.
Goal! Argentina 1, Switzerland 0. Alexis Mac Allister (Argentina) header from the left side of the six yard box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Lionel Messi with a cross following a corner.
Breel Embolo (Switzerland) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Goal! Argentina 1, Switzerland 1. Dan Ndoye (Switzerland) right footed shot from a difficult angle on the left to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Ricardo Rodríguez with a through ball.
Second yellow card to Breel Embolo (Switzerland).
Substitution, Argentina. Nico González replaces Nicolás Tagliafico.
Substitution, Argentina. Lautaro Martínez replaces Rodrigo De Paul.
Substitution, Argentina. Gonzalo Montiel replaces Nahuel Molina.
Substitution, Switzerland. Silvan Widmer replaces Djibril Sow.
Substitution, Switzerland. Zeki Amdouni replaces Dan Ndoye.
Substitution, Switzerland. Miro Muheim replaces Fabian Rieder.
Substitution, Switzerland. Eray Cömert replaces Ricardo Rodríguez.
Substitution, Argentina. Thiago Almada replaces Enzo Fernández.
Substitution, Switzerland. Ardon Jashari replaces Denis Zakaria.
Thiago Almada (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Argentina. Nicolás Otamendi replaces Cristian Romero.
Substitution, Argentina. José Manuel López replaces Leandro Paredes because of an injury.
Goal! Argentina 2, Switzerland 1. Julián Alvarez (Argentina) right footed shot from outside the box to the top right corner. Assisted by José Manuel López.
José Manuel López (Argentina) is shown the yellow card.
Substitution, Switzerland. Rubén Vargas replaces Remo Freuler.
Goal! Argentina 3, Switzerland 1. Lautaro Martínez (Argentina) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner following a fast break.
